STORY: As a User, I want to open product details page so that I can view product information
As a User, I want to see validation message when mandatory fields are left empty
As a User, I want to add product to the cart so that I can purchase that produc
As a User, I want to complete checkout using COD payment
As a User, I want to apply coupon code
As a logged- in User, I want to logout from the application
As a User, I want to update cart quantity so that product totals get updated
As a User, I want to search a valid product so that I can view matching product
As a logged-in User, I want to view my orders
As a User, when I login with invalid password I should see an error message
As a User, I want to compare products so that I can view product detials
As a User, I want to login with valid credentials so that I can access my account
As a User, I should see an error message for invalid product search
As a User, I want to remove item from the cart so that cart becomes empty
As a user, I should see error message for invalid coupon
As a User, I want to sort products by price
As a User, I want to register with valid credentials so I can create an account
As a User, I want to add product to wishlist so that I can purchase it later
As a User, I want to verify orders Page navigation
As a logged-in User, I want to view my account details
